textPlain: Expanded the invite code range for easier sign-up: hn001 to hn999

Got disappointed with Bento.me, so I decided to build my own — AirTips (https://a.coffee/).demo: https://a.coffee/becool--------I also implemented developer features include:* The ability to set page layout data via API, enabling dynamic data updates.* Support for configuring a webhook, which will send notifications when a donation is received.The project is still in a testing and rapid iteration stage — if you encounter any bugs, please report them and they will be fixed promptly.--------updated:I have generated a list of invite codes:hn001 
hn002
